title: Fully Functional Binance Trading Bot – Learn, Customize & Experiment Safely
author: qayabtw
selftext:
I've been building and testing a trading bot for Binance over the past few months. It combines momentum and mean reversion strategies using MACD, RSI, VWAP, EMA, ATR and trailing stops, with risk management baked in from the start.

It trades with real money, so I built it to be something you actually understand and control, not just run blindly.

What it does:

* Entries only trigger when multiple indicators confirm at the same time. No single-signal trades.
* Dynamic stop loss based on ATR, take profit at 2:1 ratio, trailing stop that moves with price.
* Daily circuit breaker that stops trading if you hit a loss threshold you define.
* Real-time P/L updates every minute while a position is open, full report every 10 minutes.
* Every trade gets logged to CSV automatically. Open it in Excel and you have a full history.
* Basic backtesting on historical data so you can test changes before going live.

The code is clean and heavily commented. Around 2,000 lines but nothing is hidden or obfuscated. If you know basic Python you can follow exactly what it's doing and change it.

I'm selling it for under 5 euros, mainly to filter out people who just want to resell it or mess around. Not looking to get rich off this, I use it myself.

If you want to see a sample of the code or have questions about how it works, message me directly. I'll walk you through the setup and help you get it running on your own Binance account.

Basic Python knowledge and a Binance account are all you need to get started.

comments.author: krishna18388
comments.body: Interested, how do I get started?
